scripts.build: pnpm --dir packages/hosted-execution build && pnpm --dir packages/messaging-ingress build && pnpm --dir packages/runtime-state build && pnpm --dir packages/assistant-core build && pnpm --dir packages/gateway-core build && pnpm --dir packages/gateway-local build && pnpm --dir packages/core build && pnpm --dir packages/importers build && pnpm --dir packages/device-syncd build && pnpm --dir packages/query build && pnpm --dir packages/inboxd build && pnpm --dir packages/parsers build && pnpm --dir packages/assistantd build && pnpm --dir packages/cli build && pnpm --dir packages/assistant-runtime build
scripts.clean:build:workspace:incremental: node scripts/rm-paths.mjs packages/hosted-execution/dist packages/messaging-ingress/dist packages/runtime-state/dist packages/assistant-core/dist packages/gateway-core/dist packages/gateway-local/dist packages/core/dist packages/importers/dist packages/device-syncd/dist packages/query/dist packages/inboxd/dist packages/parsers/dist packages/cli/dist packages/assistant-runtime/dist packages/assistantd/dist
scripts.clean:build:test-runtime: node scripts/rm-paths.mjs packages/contracts/dist packages/hosted-execution/dist packages/messaging-ingress/dist packages/runtime-state/dist packages/assistant-core/dist packages/gateway-core/dist packages/gateway-local/dist packages/core/dist packages/importers/dist packages/device-syncd/dist packages/query/dist packages/inboxd/dist packages/parsers/dist packages/cli/dist
scripts.clean: node scripts/rm-paths.mjs packages/*/dist packages/*/.next packages/*/.test-dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo apps/*/.next apps/*/.next-dev apps/*/.next-smoke apps/*/*.tsbuildinfo && pnpm clean:source-sidecars
scripts.chat: pnpm exec tsx packages/cli/src/bin.ts assistant chat
scripts.verify:repo: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage
